- 2033 unprotected 1st
- 2033 2nd

Cavaliers owe NBA-leading $68.671 million in tax payments. Warriors will pay $67.91 million as a repeater tax payer. Knicks owe $44.44 million after finishing $19.5 mil over tax line.

It had been held at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas the past three seasons. Now, it's centrally located. But half as many seats.

items.title: Miami Heat salary cap situation after signing Tim Hardaway Jr.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Miami Heat salary cap situation after signing Tim Hardaway Jr.

His $6.5M salary will go into the mid-level exception.

They have $8.5M remaining from it but can probably use closer to $7 million due to their first apron hard cap proximity after presumably signing Ryan Conwell.

items.title: Kam Jones waived, no picks gained in the transaction (just second round swaps), and the roster spot point isn't viable because the offseason limit is 20 players. They sold a high second-round pick for cash at the start of a rebuild, again. This is just what the Bulls do.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Kam Jones waived, no picks gained in the transaction (just second round swaps), and the roster spot point isn't viable because the offseason limit is 20 players. They sold a high second-round pick for cash at the start of a rebuild, again. This is just what the Bulls do.

A statement from Cathy Engelbert:

“The WNBA vehemently condemns any and all forms of hate. The safety and well-being of everyone in our community is always the league’s top priority. We are aware of Alyssa Thomas’ comments..

items.title: Bones Hyland has agreed to return to the Minnesota Timberwolves next season, sources told @TheAthletic. Hyland established himself as a rotation player, teaming with Ayo Dosunmu in the "Twin Turbos" backcourt.
